hero.title: Tiago Labro
hero.subtitle: <blue>Front-end</blue> and <red>back-end</red> developer in France.
hero.description: I've always been fond of Computer science since i was in middle school. My ambition is to create both on the form and the substance, but also animate projects, such as websites or apps, using various languages. My dream is to create my own video game.
